name: ThoughtSpot AI Analytics API
what_it_does: ThoughtSpot REST API v2 for AI-powered analytics platform with natural language search. Enables AI agents to query ThoughtSpot data using natural language (via Spotter AI), programmatically access answers, liveboards, worksheets, and metadata. ThoughtSpot is unique in providing NL-to-analytics capabilities that pair well with AI agents.
use_cases: Querying ThoughtSpot data using natural language prompts from business analytics agents
Retrieving liveboard data and embedded analytics from reporting automation agents
Running search-based queries against business data from conversational analytics agents
Exporting analytics results and insights from ThoughtSpot for downstream AI workflows
not_for: Organizations without ThoughtSpot (enterprise platform with significant cost)
Simple dashboards (ThoughtSpot is overkill for basic reporting needs)
Real-time operational analytics (ThoughtSpot queries analytical data stores)
best_when: An enterprise using ThoughtSpot wants AI agents to leverage ThoughtSpot's NL-to-SQL capabilities — combining ThoughtSpot's search analytics with agent-driven workflow automation.
avoid_when: You don't have ThoughtSpot. The platform is expensive enterprise software. Also: NL queries can be ambiguous — agents must verify analytics results before using in decisions.

auth.notes: ThoughtSpot OAuth 2.0 and basic auth. Trusted authentication for embedded use. Service account recommended for agent access.

pricing.paid_tiers: ThoughtSpot Team and Enterprise pricing (significant cost)
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing negotiated with ThoughtSpot sales. Significant investment. Trial available.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by deployment type and cluster size

known_agent_gotchas: Natural language queries can be ambiguous — verify analytics results before agent decisions
No public MCP server — REST API v2 integration required
ThoughtSpot REST API v2 is the current version; v1 deprecated
NL-to-SQL quality depends on worksheet design and data quality
Enterprise cost makes ThoughtSpot integration only viable for existing customers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise analytics with sensitive business data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth required. NL query results should be validated before agent decisions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise BI with sensitive analytics data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth and service account auth. Data residency options.
